ashwood_watchspear.name: Ashwood Watchspear
ashwood_watchspear.lore: Carried by village watch patrols, this spear favors control and reliability over brute force.

stitched_hide_jerkin.name: Stitched Hide Jerkin
stitched_hide_jerkin.lore: A practical trail jerkin reinforced with layered hide panels for dependable protection.
